programme.title: FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake
programme.desc: Season 8 Episode 3 kicks off our first open-water shoot of the year as Paul Ethier and Jeff Shippam make their way to the legendary Mattagami Lake for some classic spring walleye action. With competitive tournaments on pause this season, the guys revisit their favourite early-season hotspots—areas they’d normally fish under pressure—now with time to explore, adapt, and enjoy the day. From structure-hopping to dialing in the spring pattern, Paul and Jeff put their tournament instincts to work for a fun, relaxed day chasing hungry post-spawn walleye in Northern Ontario.

programme.title: FishON! | Remote Escapes: Pike Frenzy and Hidden Lake Explorations
programme.desc: In the thrilling Season 7 finale, Paul & Perry and the team venture deep into Northern Ontario, using a Polaris Ranger to access a remote lake with high hopes for walleye. However, the day takes a surprising turn as Northern Pike steal the show with their spirited action. The adventure doesn’t end there—a bonus portage into another lake offers a chance to explore uncharted waters. It’s a fitting conclusion to a season filled with the unexpected and unforgettable.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: Laura’s search for farm heroes leads her to White Cloud, Kansas to meet with Ray Archuleta who is inspiring an entire generation of agricultural trailblazers. In order to prove how vital soil health is to farming, Ray and Laura get their hands dirty in the fields to collect samples. With three samples in tow, its back to the lab they go to try out Ray’s rain simulator. How will the farm samples stack up? Let’s find out.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: It’s overhaul day on Boom America, and the A-Team gets to work. Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail kick things off with Switch It Up, laying out strategies around “The Volume” while Kyle Reyes pushes for a powerful pivot—refocusing the company squarely on the booming trades community. Next, the team digs into Raida Tech, where Laura highlights how the company is operating 25 years ahead of the curve but desperately needs clearer marketing to match its groundbreaking innovation. American Stories creator Bob Cefail stops by to share the inspiration behind Boom America and the future of independent production in the U.S. From there, the A-Team turns to Tangible Assets, helping refine how Dale can monetize his coin collection business, boost credibility, and reach the right investors. Finally, New Home National Title gets a full diagnostic from the experts as they map out how the company can scale, gain visibility, and earn the recognition it deserves nationwide.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: This episode of Boom America dives headfirst into the businesses modernizing America’s energy and infrastructure landscape. The A-Team kicks things off with Switch It Up, breaking down how smart energy upgrades - like high-efficiency lighting, EV charging, and electrical modernization - are helping companies cut costs and stay competitive. Next, the focus shifts to Raida Tech, where the team highlights a company operating years ahead of the market but in need of sharper messaging to fully unlock its potential. From there, Tangible Assets, LLC takes center stage as the experts help refine its positioning, credibility, and growth strategy in a crowded investment space. Finally, New Home National Title gets a no-nonsense diagnostic as the team maps out a clear path to scale, increase visibility, and claim its place as a national contender. From practical innovation to bold business strategy, this episode proves that the future of American enterprise is powered by smart decisions and even smarter execution.

programme.title: WPT Ladies Championship 2023 - Part 3
programme.desc: One of poker’s top female earners of all time, Kathy Leibert finds herself as the shortest stack at the table with only four women remaining. Watch Kathy reach into her bag of tricks as she attempts to battle back in hopes of becoming the first ever WPT Ladies Champion.

programme.title: WPT Ladies Championship 2023 - Part 4
programme.desc: Only three ladies remain in the battle for over $100,000 and the title of WPT Ladies Champion. Olga Iermolcheva has a commanding chip lead, but her competitors are showing no signs of backing down. Prepare for plenty of thrilling poker action under the lights at Wynn Las Vegas as we play down to the crowning of the first ever WPT Ladies Champion.

programme.title: WPT Prime Championship 2023 - Part 1
programme.desc: The final table of the inaugural WPT Prime Championship at Wynn Las Vegas is underway. The $2 million guaranteed prizepool event saw a record-setting turnout of 5,430 entries, nearly tripling the guarantee, which means that the eventual winner will walk away with over $700,000 and the title of the first ever WPT Prime Champion.

programme.title: WPT Prime Championship 2023 - Part 2
programme.desc: We are down to the final four players of the first ever WPT Prime Championship. With so much at stake, nobody is willing to settle for anything less than first place. Over $700,000 will be awarded to the victor. Don’t miss a second of the action as WPT high stakes tournament poker action continues at Wynn Las Vegas.

programme.title: WPT Prime Championship 2023 - Part 3
programme.desc: Big pots are being pushed all around the table as the final four players of the WPT Prime Championship battle for a first place prize of over $700,000 and the title of WPT Prime Champion. Unpredictable bluffs and big bets for value are in abundance as the WPT Prime Championship final table continues at Wynn Las Vegas.

programme.title: S1E3 The Jackson Goldstone Story
programme.desc: Beyond Limits: The Jackson Goldstone Story is an electrifying YouTube series that follows mountain biking sensation Jackson Goldstone through his 2023 UCI Downhill World Championship season. Watch as he pushes his limits on some of the most dangerous downhill courses in the world, from steep, rocky descents to twisting forest trails, attacking every challenge with unmatched skill and determination. Go behind the scenes to see the intense training sessions, precise bike tuning, and mental preparation that fuel his success. Experience the rush of high-stakes racing with heart-pounding runs, fierce rivalries, and moments that will keep you holding your breath. More than just the action, Beyond Limits reveals Jackson’s personal journey, the sacrifices he makes for his passion, and the powerful support network that drives him forward. This is the ultimate inside look at a world-class athlete chasing glory on two wheels.
